central_visual_idea: Luna standing beside a laptop in a calm reset pose, turning pre-meeting stress into practical relief.
composition: Vertical portrait, Luna centered slightly right, laptop and calendar alert visible left, clean apartment background, warm daylight.
avatar_or_scene_requirements: Luna must match the creator profile's soft athletic wardrobe and warm direct-to-camera presence.
The laptop should make the workday constraint visible without showing private details.
text_overlay_policy: Use one short overlay only: '2-minute reset'. No dense instructional text.
generation_prompt: Create a vertical single-image social post of Luna Fit, a warm approachable wellness avatar, standing beside an open laptop in a softly lit apartment. She is mid-reset with relaxed shoulders and a calm expression. Include subtle visual context that she is between meetings. Clean composition, warm neutrals, one bright accent color, no platform UI.
